he48df990ge896g43aeg83ffgc8358054dcee: This one had the same problem as you. Attacked us in the woods together with some goblins.
he854bc05g70b8g4566g88e6g9efb81a2a926: Don't worry about him on the table. I'm not in the habit of killing drow.
h0be83191gb350g40eag8980ge79bf5a5dae1: He attacked Master Halsin and I in the woods, leading a pack of goblins.
ha88f54feg0cfag4b11g989fg7a8de306be77: Tadpole crawled out of his head soon after.
h88aec5cegb3aag4a89ga4dag1db78acf1c12: He and I have the same kind of parasite?
he8268daag8e93g4aeeg9558g0103bc40d6f2: The drow and I have the same kind of parasite?
h7b607784g1592g46fbg9493g87abe25f233f: Seems so. Gave Master Halsin a right start.
hccf663f1g636dg4178gaef2g2b10d8479cdc: It's why he joined the adventurers on their expedition. To find out what was happening.
h6ed58439ge24bg4e0ag891cgb31613d474b7: A pity you got me instead of him. He understands these things - studied them. Still, we have options.
h2857d518g04ccg496eg9ebdge114fbe86667: You don't have to be here for this.
hf60b3502ga99cg4815gbf73g14436fe87189: I will remain. I've a vested interest in the outcome.
h1c4ee4f8g05d9g4f5fgb5e8g42cdea807e45: All right, let's see what we can do.
h2b4c00e8g9c58g4c13g97d5g1f78201204fa: Halsin? I saw him in the goblin camp.
ha94f4937g4ba3g4556g88a5g78a0cfe8d9a4: Thank you, I'll take anything that can help.
hf0114ad6g8049g42cfg90eag43b99c51e4df: Of course. Now, tell me what's been happening. Any symptoms? Strange events?
h2c2c56e7g92d3g48ddg9f10gc913ebee3948: I can merge my mind with anyone else that's infected.
h5ad71e28g851cg4d84gb0bfg407e0c677045: Victims can identify each other? Not that the others know they've victims, of course.
hb296031eg3ad8g4bd6g828egc33b2ac45b77: How'd you pick up the parasite? Halsin was desperate to find where all this was happening.
h209c249cge586g49f4g8cd7g9b8dbcd2219f: On a mind flayer ship - I was kidnapped and infected.
h23fa0e9dg2165g4e82g8b5fgc9f43f6da019: A mind flayer ship? But Master Halsin was sure -
h730eab58g5115g48b2g88c5g38d4ef551b97: ... Look, you've been straight with me, so I'll be straight with you. You're dangerous. If you transform here, we're all dead.
h38c83afcg96cag4eb2g9469g8d5a448865ec: But you seem like a good soul. You deserve a chance to save yourself.
hf1121ca6g4a9cg4070gab31g5e9b3315c90d: This is a vial of wyvern poison. Swear to me you'll swallow it if you feel any symptoms.
h622b0d2dg02dfg44ddga7c0g0617497d50fd: More poison? I would've preferred a cure.
h5631c9b8g59f9g460ag8b1ag5bea84aa0108: I don't have a cure. Only a way out.
h5dd946abgf72eg4990g9b1cg0ce440d94803: I'm sorry for misleading you, but I had to be sure you weren't a threat before I told you everything.
h9a29866age6d0g4943g85f9g768f8d511df6: Now, do I have your word or not?
hab054c40ga570g4611gb911ga613a5d668db: I thought you could cure me? What about that branch of yours?
h93266af0g430dg4896g90fcg6ee800c1cc4a: The thorn? Coated in a fatal toxin. It was a last resort, in case I couldn't trust you.
h5f7643b2gee1eg4c79gaa29gd997e2b4cb7d: I swear, by the Lord of Justice.
h13219fefg0720g450cg9efcg22631b2e634f: By our Lady of Silver, I swear it.
hb374ef60g3a3eg4152g90ecg36710eac9777: In the name of He Who Endures, I swear it.
h0ae5f1f4g3f09g481ega16bgbde02876de5a: By the Mother of All Magic, I swear it.
hac20a3a0g33dag4213gae76gb20e85b07db4: In the Watcher's name, I swear it.
hdbe48041gdc6ag444bg8421g1706d07e9c8a: In Kelemvor's name, I swear it.
hc22c9ae4g3798g4746gb5a6g57575caee299: By the Lord of Knowledge, I swear it.
h82443deegb76dg4b1bg9ca8g302576717a8d: By the Lord of Battles, I swear it.
hce2917a2ge7f4g4209ga79egbfe4d95ca9df: I swear, in my Lady's name.
h146f6c03g9fc6g419ega5feg383246b80755: I swear, in the name of the Most High.
h183305a8g8315g49e0gac73g6d4effe9bc99: Before you and my God, I swear it.
h4c8e66ffg5b0eg44b1g95a0gd9c7b2d3c91f: I hope it doesn't come to that but... thank you. Here.
ha43d2dabgb7b1g4034g8668ga344a72f9bde: You know, I've spent my life treating folk and never once saw a mind flayer infection. Then suddenly there's dozens of you - maybe more.
h5ec396d1ga165g488dgb24cgf1be22b57239: Thank you. I truly hope it doesn't come to that.
h00b30ae5g441ag4560gaf70gff0a7447c5c3: No. I'm not taking poison from a woman I can't trust.
h1a9fa2c0g8beeg4596ga37fg2290c413a1e7: But you have to. Don't you understand? You could kill us all!
h78666209gef6bg43e4gb494g02f3de3dd0d0: I don't care - I am not going to die!
hde4290cag1099g4590g8739gb2f333a597aa: Then I've no choice. I'm sorry.
h2e403db6g8402g4270gaa35ga1ade8654f13: Swear to me that if you feel any symptoms, you'll end things yourself.
h95308383gbd46g40b8g9e41g4ac9a3ecba3e: I won't turn into one of them.
h87144534g3d06g4c83g9ca3g3a151a4e8b33: Are you mad? I'm not going to kill myself - symptoms or not.
h07112b5bgefceg4850g95a2g12bbd06ff8de: I don't know, I just woke up with it.
h56d8c27eg2e46g4b99g82e7g71de424314e8: You're asking a lot of questions...
h1a027494g1b5ag4533gafcdg1c8d9103c3b0: Of course I am. Lives are on the line, and not just yours.
h2984abdeg088fg49d6ga888gf1d39f713710: So tell me, where'd you get that thing?
h8c78d247g94cbg4fbcgb13bg3d742398eb45: Cure me first, then I'll answer all the questions you want.
hd7ae931dgf1d0g4c6agb9efg7ba73799a46d: Look, are you going to cure me or not?
hc996ce7cg8251g4c35gb8dbg7b9aa18b7f26: I'm trying to help you, but I need to be sure.
h2be7d6e8g4b0cg459dg96ccg9b7891743840: Put the thorns down and I'll tell you.
h6da6eb38g5734g4693gae77ga774b16275e3: I fell from a ship in the sky, but something caught me. It saved my life.
h4315d05cg5dbag475cg946fg364a29846bec: Protected from on high? Sounds like the drow - Master Halsin said he was tougher than he had any right to be.
h5f3d44a9g7424g4ef9gafe4g283592b88390: An intellect devourer spoke to me as if I were one of its own.
h65686c71ge1f9g4d55g9ab5g1310d7e4a15c: It recognised you as being infected? Well now, that's something.
h0fbd357egd35cg4023ga81dgb5032f05669b: No, nothing strange, I just want it out of my head.
h850cf53cg90eag4158g8c36g90067ba6de5c: Well... if someone else has a tadpole, our minds can merge.
h35b8b249g1bb3g4be4g941cg42dcfb9eca44: I did fall from a ship in the sky, but something caught me.
h46a9ac5fg4bc6g46b7g987fgc35487df8e9d: An intellect devourer spoke to me. That was a little odd.
h93b06b7agad21g421ega3acg9897ede4cf7a: All right. I suppose that makes things easier.
hdb59288bg05b5g47c3g956ag99828a27b6f5: So you can poison me? Absolutely not!
h518b601fgf575g4777ga05cg4f07a6804f68: Now, your arm, please. You don't have time for games.
h5291d7cag7425g4576g9a1dg8c2df5f029d7: Be careful. Your legs'll probably give out first.
h49830c0dg5af6g46beg8bcega3b18d9563e5: My legs? What kind of cure is this?
hdf1852a6gf435g4ed1gaa95g44f78eaf72f0: I'm sorry. Maybe Master Halsin could have plucked it from your head, but I can't.
h477f6e41g572ag4626ga6c6g927b8a83fd10: Without him here, the only treatment for an illithid tadpole is death. You're a risk to the people around you.
hc45bf31fg578eg4bfagb90fg16675c1c7e42: I'm truly, truly sorry. For what it's worth, the poison is painless. It'll be like going to sleep.
hbab9feffgc8cfg407dg978egffdb5ba823c2: I know where Halsin is! Give me the antidote or he'll die.
h300c08cega82cg4d56gb105g5a210991279b: Hells' teeth, why didn't you say anything sooner? I'll tell you where the antidote is, but there's a condition.
h6366e33dga197g40a9g91a9ga3604bd763fc: This is a vial of wyvern poison. Swear to me you'll swallow it if you feel any symptoms.
hb1d542e6ge2c7g4096gac18gdd64864abad3: Please, try to relax. This doesn't have to be hard.
hdb57d4ceg499dg44begaa74gf5327089c086: You can't have it. I can't risk you turning - you'd kill us all.
h648b3868g00f2g40e3gab6fgd47f5b07c533: But I don't have symptoms - I'm not changing.
h244a7604g63adg4d06gb9b8ga836b80361e6: Same as the drow... But Master Halsin said he'd turn eventually.
h7634dbebga21cg40a2g8705g01d994fab6f9: Eventually? That gives me time to find a cure.
h996ef48fgd452g4b27ga3ccg92ca151a4b6c: Maybe, but it's one hell of a maybe. You could have days or seconds.
h1d5e9035g29e9g4874gb15eg2ac10f0a7307: As long as there's a chance, you're not saving me. You're commiting murder.
h7c2d7a26g4086g41b4gaff9g8e6fa3335358: I'm sorry. There's nothing you can say to change my mind.
hcd92b394g477cg4d94gbc38g0fafaaa189c1: The door's locked. Neither of us are leaving until this is done.
h718b5380gfeacg47d6g8a69g1a190b24f67b: Gods above. It's a risk, but maybe you deserve a chance...
he0a4eb02gc32eg434bga9aegb2ac2ce0b507: All right! Master Halsin did say the drow's tadpole was dormant. Maybe yours is too.
h5f9eeb93g324ag4c52g9a61gcdf4109ec3ff: Now, this is a vial of wyvern poison. It's quick and painless. Swear to me you'll swallow it if you feel any symptoms.
h181945begef96g4d27gb789g24f1a8e5a2d3: I swear, by the Lord of Justice.
hdee2c4ffg71e0g4641gbe3fgb56d8c512873: By our Lady of Silver, I swear it.
h838e619cg25a2g40acg949egb1396e651d79: In the name of He Who Endures, I swear it.
ha88dca0bg869eg4a92gb7c3g7cb569027e46: By the Mother of All Magic, I swear it.
hed190fa4gc8e9g4c72gb420g39e3296a2de4: In the Watcher's name, I swear it.
h5804e37bg6fddg456dg8f8ege4b17dda72e8: In Kelemvor's name, I swear it.
h57521806g59acg4790gb615g05c3a80ffca2: By the Lord of Knowledge, I swear it.
h18f6f01dg45d4g4be6gba05g50a34e767363: By the Lord of Battles, I swear it.
h8eaba6a8g8d44g4c0ag8be5g50490ad8d915: I swear, in my Lady's name.
h762dee16ga949g4647g9da0ge2af38168825: I swear, in the name of the Most High.
he55efc5age92fg42b9ga56ag7f1f53fa7169: Before you and my God, I swear it.
h4c21e65bge986g4361gb85cga986102c8c71: And here's the antidote. Do not mix those two up.
h48796879gbe41g431agaa99g4fe9a34691cd: Master Halsin and I were tracking them, studying them, trying to figure out what the Hells was going on.
h3c2dc334gca6bg4670gaf78gbbb4cfd2363d: Because you should all be changing - there should be a small army of mind flayers out there! But you're not. Weird powers aside, you seem perfectly normal.
h9c15234dge47cg4eaega067gbb513012b6ba: What do you mean 'should' be changing?
hc92b0813g4db9g4aa9ga714g781f7e514941: Mind flayers reproduce by infecting someone with their parasite. Seven gruesome days later, the victim transforms and a new mind flayer is born.
h82adea27g89adg46a6g8778ge439eadf9cd9: The thing in your skull, though? It's different to anything in our records.
h5b2d4212gd988g4fdbg83b2gd740c7ac965e: It's one of their worms, for sure, but this one gives you powers - telepathic connections. And it doesn't turn you into one of them.
h990b1492g34d9g40ffg89d1ga45c4c140058: So you think it's only a matter of time?
h95b43824gdde4g4335g9b21gf33bb7a0b4f8: Could be, but there's a lot we don't know. Infected - folks like you - have been converging on an old temple of Selûne, and I've no idea why.
hf75d7728g2ae3g4c13ga2cfga6595852a7e8: When Master Halsin heard the adventurers were heading that way, he saw a chance to get answers. Joined on the spot.
ha28ac4fag06d0g4a23g8a96g7b144b4fdc8b: Whatever he found there, he didn't make it back.
h58b47ff3g33c4g4797g8dcdg408be8e70173: What do you want me to do?
h80ec74bdg9cb8g4944g9526g0bd78b12383f: The thing is, I've sent birds to find him, but the place is rotten with goblins. None of us can even get close.
hcb7c6ea2g0ed6g4b37gb5f1g2776be482ccf: You, though? You're one of them - technically speaking, I mean. They might not kill someone carrying their parasite.
hd791ae9ag1a12g4d88gb62eg44e6c2d5be2d: If you can get Halsin out of there, we can discover what he learned. And perhaps he can save your life. How's that sound?
hdf53d36fg5358g4c76g9f6dg5ee46b8d7184: Thank you. It would mean everything to the grove. To me.
h6cb339e3gfff7g47e4g938bg452fab26dd29: Good luck out there. And if things start to go bad - remember the oath you swore.
h388a8ec9g8db2g4673gb40dg7eec3a3271fa: Good luck out there. And if things start to go bad - remember the vial. Remember your oath.
he5ba2075gf548g4eabg9773g6c0c4b3a7213: It sounds like you're making a lot of assumptions that could kill me.
h662ec2a3gf111g4256g956dg69599382ef10: The way I see it, you have two options. Halsin, or that wyvern poison.
h9b36e6d5g79e3g4c22g9c7bgfc40ce3744e0: I don't envy your choice, truly. But this is the hand fate's dealt you.
hf464ddf4g0181g4117gb48fg021cb7e29974: The way I see it, you have two options. Halsin or death - whatever form it takes.
h440eab4cg5549g4277g82d3g73f9bfc2050b: You're sure he can cure me?
h3a6c9991g97adg4e08g9b32gb46e90590498: I can't make any promises. This is like nothing we've seen before.
hf067c57ag78c6g47dcgbf31g20070bc8eb1b: But I know this for sure: Master Halsin is the only one close to understanding these things. He's your best bet to survive.
h03e76097ge080g47d3gb5fag690930cf3b0f: Otherwise, that vial's your only option.
h10276f20g1317g4736gaf34g665b4d57e31d: Otherwise you'll need to end things yourself, before the transformation really takes hold.
h941c4654g32d4g485fg8747gdab992d3eee4: That sounds like suicide. I won't do it.
h285fea9ag9585g4dc6g80cagb5dd896666a0: It might be suicide either way. Trust me, you do not want to become one of those monsters.
h320d5debgb29bg4171gaac8g7318af20aacc: But of course, the choice is yours. I just hope you find a cure out there.
h5caa68fcg92d2g44a2gbf59gb78055056246: If you can find Halsin and get him out of there, we can discover what he learned. And perhaps he can save your life. How's that sound?
h07e43459gfb79g441agb854g513e1aa6326e: I already know where to find him: the wolf pens of the goblin camp.
h6908a385g32e0g40fdg9759g382c35829a4d: Gods above - why didn't you say so?
h5486d22eg6baeg4fc4ga8f3g2ce0b28ee01a: Please, you have to bring him back to us. For your own sake as much as ours.
hf4970c54gd724g4c0dgadcagacbbb9ab3623: I wish I could tell you what happened out there, but those adventurers were the only witnesses. And they're long gone.
h6b784e67ga83bg4bc3g8df1gecc2c24b3ffd: All I can say for sure is they all went to the old temple of Selûne and Master Halsin didn't make it back.
hf61a18b1g85dfg4481ga726gfd47aba53018: I wish I could tell you more, but only those adventurers know what happened out there.
hc9b98f42g16a1g4f41g91e4g56aad1d2e387: I've sent birds to find him, but the place is rotten with goblins. And if my birds can't get close, what chance do I have?
hdef90e0eg7a05g47e5gaceag69e540872f6d: I think so. I hope so. I've sent birds to find him, but they can't get close without goblins trying to shoot them down.
h71745544g4dbcg42ffgb521g3182ee84f653: You said you were tracking other victims. Did they change?
h4f38b3beg4e2fg4799gb00agd440987ee82b: Hard to say, there's a lot we don't know. Infected - folks like you - have been converging on an old temple of Selûne, and I've no idea why.
h729ba091ge906g4fb1gb80bg06e940de674d: Excellent news! All the power, none of the tentacles.
h67e44b0ag4698g43f1g9fd9g0702a5b5a94a: I wouldn't be so sure, there's a lot we don't know. Infected - folks like you - have been converging on an old temple of Selûne, and I've no idea why.
h97e44a59g0cbfg4e21g8e6fg2d696f99a5e3: You must've learned something from studying them?
h88802400ge9f5g43f3ga3c8gff8081bbeda0: For one, that thing in your head is like nothing we've ever seen from mind flayers.
hee5fb84bg362bg4336gbfebgb6d672462653: Just tell me if there's a cure or not.
h2087372ag5c0dg423dgac65ge4d0d17cab9c: You can't cure what you don't understand. And as much as I know about mind flayers, I can't make heads nor tails of this.
he36431a9g9bf6g402fg91f1gb1a7837974a5: I've spent my life treating folk and never once saw a mind flayer infection. Then suddenly there's dozens of you - maybe more.
h85f044d7gb0e6g4a89gb0e3g4f4cc9936bae: Now, I've an antidote - um ... where is the bloody thing?
h33a12129g393eg4e5ag8b07g09dd8e75522a: Well, not to worry. Have a read of that book - Flora of the Dalelands. There's a recipe for your antidote in there.
h62d4560bg5933g4487g832agf2a26ae9f4d5: It won't cure what's in your head, though.
h147cd2cdg626eg48aeg9cb2g6626d4f00fa7: Here, take this. It'll stop the poison, but I can't do anything for that wriggler in your head.
hc25bcd00g847eg4887g8f54g5d650c54eeaf: Then I'm sorry, but I can't. You're too dangerous.
h828db68ag93d2g43e8g9c49g722630999545: By rights your teeth should be falling out and your skin turning grey. I don't know why you haven't changed, but I can't risk you suddenly turning into a mind flayer.
he4efd9d5gb170g42adg831fg8ca7a262456d: Do whatever you need to, but we're not leaving this room until it's over.
h7b102b13g0e19g421eg948fgc9aaf3b192c3: But first, swear to me you'll do what needs to be done.
h1803e6d2ga714g45a3ga816gfafadceab9c8: Swear that if you feel any symptoms, you'll end things yourself.
h54bf4b3dge19ag4e35gb6c2gb8bb9d455b9e: I won't turn into one of them.
he596cac9g40a6g47d9gbab2gf9a6e73f6557: Are you mad? I'm not going to kill myself - symptoms or not.
h1df7b4bdgfe77g46ebga488gc0eaa19c5196: You said there were others like me - we need to cure this, or your kin will never be safe.
h32c5a108g8534g4268g9e6eg8e65ac82f5e2: I'm the only one that can find Halsin.
he802df75gbf0eg4f92gb2c6gfecee604b468: You said I have time - let me use it.
h85abfdb9g9907g4079g9a0dge92755cc04d7: Magic can cure me if you can't. I know the Weave well!
hc097e7bfg3105g462ag8d35g0e48d06058e0: Magic can cure me if you can't. I know the Weave well!
h8643cc8agbb84g4dd1g81b9g01a282cb2554: I have important information - the grove will be destroyed without it.
hc4a48ca5g545fg4dcegae07g7a8dbc0e4c05: I'm safe - I'm not showing symptoms, and it's been days.
h62fb1e9dg4261g473dgb4efgb8dcf121165e: Recite what you know of her order - this can't be allowed!
hd2d138aag584dg4673g9f49g11db1c6e7ca3: Recite her order's druidic law - this can't be allowed!
h2b4f67e4g547ag48a2gbaf2g476ea3f40e91: You can't do this - your leader needs to talk to me.
h52b9f24bg99c5g4fc8g9eeeg262c4a46f070: Magic can cure me if you can't. I know the Weave well!
h623861d3gd83ag4fdfgb909g9e23ebbe9abb: You're not getting out of here. I'll do whatever I have to to protect my kin.
h97639982gb8cag4059gaca5ga61d56744f36: Magic can cure me if you can't. I know the Weave well!
hef52266fg73fcg4d53g893age95412102530: I have important information - your grove will die without it.
he60f74d2g3c43g470aga413g12465ec50bf0: We can look after our own. Starting with this.
hb2231b99g847bg4971gb1ecgc28a50fbfc03: But I'm safe - I'm not showing symptoms, and it's been days.
hcd497b7cg6dcbg47d9gb95bge2cac5eac894: Recite what you know of her order - this can't be allowed!
hc343021eg7518g4e13gb56bg95ac6dad8688: I understand you're angry, I really do, but I won't let you endanger these people.
h522a9676g867bg43d9g817bg4f255faf2546: Recite her order's druidic law - this can't be allowed!
hf6d11076g4826g4fb5g8c07g89690084aa49: You can't do this - your leader needs to talk to me.
h13a297a4g3bafg430bgad91g9e8643bbb494: I respect Kagha, but she can't order me to put everyone's lives at risk.
hb3864263g27b3g4aaagac38g0ad70ae9c356: Try to recall the tenets of her order - she can't support this!
hd74e9a52gdd87g4a18gaf5fgf7c0a723b5b7: Try to recall the tenets of her order - no druid could support this!
h740cbd61g537dg47e9g80edgcaacd6f11f34: You can't do this - your leader needs to talk to me.
he6dc2d4fgf846g4814g92e6g5087b3202fa5: Examine the branch to identify the poison.
h4c8a022bg5011g45d8g8ff0g83cce8d06bc6: *Not many thorns have such unique poison - it has to be Kelemvor's Kiss, a plant from the Dalelands. There is a cure but, try as you might, you can't recall it.*
h3bc46edeg8f6bg49d1gbc75g14544321a79a: Give me the antidote. I know you have one.
h9d19ca45g19e3g4807g88b8g02be1fedbe6b: *You try to find a clue among the thorns, but there's nothing. You have no idea what poison's tainted your veins.*
h4569044eg27d8g4225ga2ecgb41144135e03: Whatever this is, you had better have an antidote.
h4e028bc6gf88dg4581ga8cdg59ab6791fcdc: Examine the branch - have you come across this plant before?
hbc6dd8deg26a8g4b88ga4f5ga9f53ad4561a: Grab the branch and try to identify the poison.
h0985f5cag3e43g495eg8a11gf244971afb85: It's too late. It's already in your system.
h827e5489gd4bag4562g90cfga202d390d26f: Grab and examine the branch - have you come across this plant before?
h449e7e54gaed2g45d9g89cag30b45aedd78f: The door's locked. Neither of us are leaving until this is done.
h2b426819gafa6g43d3g8ea1gaa8bd180d418: What in the hells have you done?
h77730f41gc894g4af8g8f36gf4313ea6056d: You came to me for help. Do you want it or not?
h8df9d49fge272g4b64g9e60gcfa861f00633: No! I can't let you leave - you could transform any second.
h9f84147ege525g45dcga0bdgd60f2d6d316b: This is the last time I'll ask. Please.
he6cb21a4g9f3bg45ffga277g6bf84529b995: You're not asking. This is a threat.
he400747cg0f8cg4f9dg8350g76505c794704: *You dodge her blow, but as you regain your footing you can see the pain in her eyes.*
hdd7b7bc2gfc33g40eegbb28g56598ad1229e: I'm sorry, I truly am, but I can't let you go.
h69e041bcg60beg4c7agbad7g7e0d71e491df: If you transform out there, you'll kill everyone in the grove. Everyone for leagues around.
h064c61d5g5cb1g42cag893ag9bd5a22c3aa1: I know where Halsin is! I can save him, but only if you let me go.
h79923d0dgcfc5g4257g8ceagc5ff9549c181: If anyone can help you, it'll be him. He studied that tadpole for days, and the birds told him about plenty of others with the same infection.
hecec6f7eg1aedg4ddbgb00fgd8876795cb81: I'll unlock the door, but I have one condition.
hdf7fd66eg08f2g4142g9b25g8cc060f3ee08: I'm not showing symptoms - that means I have time.
h96591ddbg2701g4698g88c7g2fc4d1584dc2: Master Halsin did said the drow's tadpole was dormant. Maybe yours is too.
h47eabadcgba4cg4b79gb21aga31fcccc63ea: I just want a chance to find a cure.
hb42a7b49g0e84g4244g9386gad54642da288: All right, but on one condition.
hea55d866g4163g4220g810cg283fb0cab1c7: No one else can stop those goblins. You need me.
hb1af293fgd688g4d6dgbdccg5f7cbe1f7e34: Exactly! I'm glad you're coming to your senses.
ha101b819g2329g4892gbdcag44aa32ec7117: I don't want to hurt you, but I can't let you live. You're too dangerous.
h3117c8b8gb63ag4695g953ag518a9086166e: Try to recall the tenets of her order - she can't support this!
h75002423gd6ccg40aeg94d7g801675386e98: Try to recall the tenets of her order - no druid could support this!
h1f28a5b8g6a15g4900g9ca0g42094e6cd9c3: You can't hit me, let alone kill me. Don't make me put you down.
h2759b080g89e5g4134g9c44gf975ff930505: You - you're right. I'm no use to the others dead.
h02541cd2g2198g418fg9a77g18d8319f45a7: I'm trained in combat, you're a druid with a stick. Don't make me kill you.
ha6f72744gc8ddg4323g8d68gdb4fa7ef6609: *You try to dodge her blow, but she catches you, scratching your hand.*
h590d589eg31ffg4bf6ga997gd7a46119206e: Don't be a fool. I'd kill you before you could blink.
hd8faf109g245bg43dcg8856g8c0bfe83423b: *She doesn't hesitate, moving quickly. Before you realise what's happening, you feel a burning scratch on your hand.*
hb6f5aa49ga77dg49dcgbd35g78d78876565a: I - I'm sorry, but I can't let you go.
hd3957e85g21b9g4980g91f7ga7a7077aa0ab: What's that plant? Will it help?
hc2b941acg39cfg46ddg9a31g1643e213a586: It might, but first things first. Tell me about your symptoms - have you noticed anything strange happening?
h7da600d5g0de1g43c3g8475gb8e238d9cfb1: It 'might'? What aren't you telling me?
he12b5962g06a0g4386ga196g90114e6201d0: I'm telling you everything you need to know. Believe me on that.
hc294768fg0749g4bf8ga6a8g1697a5dd8f7f: I want to help you, but I can't unless you work with me. So: has anything unusual happened to you?
h7e1764c6gd384g4326g8d1fg2481fc86d118: *Looking closer, you recognise the branch and it's no druidic cure. She's holding Kelemvor's Kiss, a briar from the Dalelands and a deadly poison.*
hdd84b6c6g297ag48adgb2b7g3da8c9d29c2a: *Looking closer, you realise you've seen this thorn in the wilds - it's Kelemvor's Kiss, a briar from the Dalelands. And a deadly poison.*
h2def966age219g4425g842fg34b726b815f4: What is this? I came to you for help!
hc94ce52ag1e04g4566g9e00g04d10f6551cb: I don't trust you. I'm leaving.
h1404970dg68b1g478fg9fc8g073ae4d3f983: Put the briar down and we'll talk.
hf1aee13egb8d5g4407g95cdga9c0176bd2b9: Try to poison me and you'll regret it.
hc2860ebbg41fag426dg9808ge718e1d5be0a: This was a mistake. I should go.
h5b1460f9g1cacg4545g9e96gd3cf5f943b9f: Just hurry up and cure me, I don't have time to chat.
he34222fcg40e1g41b2gafcbgaeaf08530705: First things first. Tell me, have you noticed anything unusual? Not just symptoms - any strange events?
ha9769976gd122g4f95g9f1cg3c67279dcbd2: No, I'll stay. I'd rather know exactly what you're up to.
ha5b6f1e5ga1f6g4f0bg8d74g50d1623b5608: Please, don't mind me. I'll just watch.
he9323536gdc8bg4288gbccag290bbc2ed85c: I'll hang around, if it's all the same.
h69499d88gf94eg4831gb272gdee4e6ec907d: I'm interested in the procedure actually. Please, go ahead.
h20dca0c2g8e48g4602ga0aegfc99b6d13e43: I'm hoping for a less grave cure.
hd268de08g03f6g4099g9fdegbd896f795d35: I'll do the best I can.
hfabf1b8egb8e8g46ecgb2dfg521326579753: I'm no Master Halsin, mind. He'd have your tadpole out like that. Still, we have options.
h612de645gcf16g4bb1ga96cg848a27fb96c4: So you killed him and laid him out on the table?
h0d6ece28gca6ag46b1g99f9gfa6db560d3db: Is everyone being captured by mind flayers these days? Didn't think it was a common experience.
h06be6dc8gda6eg48ccg885egbb7e750e77d4: Rather too common as of late. At least that's what Master Halsin suspected.
